name: Spark
description: A focused bolt of crackling force.

name: Ember Lance
description: A fan of burning embers that scorches nearby enemies.

name: Ice Storm
description: A roaring burst of sleet and jagged ice that lashes every hostile foe nearby.
damage_context: [a/an] [verb] raked by freezing shards and numbing wind.

name: Healing Light
description: A sudden restorative pulse that immediately heals your wounds.
support_context: A sudden wave of restorative light surges through you, mending injuries at once.

name: Regeneration Ward
description: A steady restorative ward that heals you each battle round, even outside combat.
support_context: A pale ward settles around you, knitting your wounds with each heartbeat of battle.
observer_action: [actor_name] focuses deeply, weaving a regeneration ward.
observer_context: A pale ward settles around [actor_object], knitting wounds with each heartbeat of battle.

name: Arc Bolt
description: A rigid line of blue force cracks outward.

name: Field Dressing
description: A practiced battlefield dressing that keeps an ally's wounds closing over the next few rounds.
support_context: Practiced hands bind your wounds; the dressing keeps them closing.

name: Mending Word
description: A murmured word of mending that closes an ally's wounds at once.
support_context: A murmured word of mending knits your wounds closed.

name: Bark Skin
description: A strip of scored bark and a binding word harden a living creature against blows.
support_context: A close-grained layer of bark forms over your skin, flexing at the joints.
observer_action: [actor_name] presses a thumb to a scored strip of bark and speaks a binding word.
observer_context: [actor_name]'s skin hardens into close-grained bark that flexes at the joints.

name: Life Siphon
description: Threads of crimson light loop back to the caster.
restore_context: Crimson vitality floods back into you.

name: Graveflare
description: A burst of funeral fire and bitter cinders hurled into a single foe.
damage_context: [a/an] [verb] scorched by a hush of ash and funeral flame.

name: Martyr's Keeping
description: An old tomb-rite that hardens the flesh and recalls a fragment of buried resolve.
support_context: Ash settles over the wounds and seals them with stern, uncanny calm.
observer_action: [actor_name] raises a soot-marked hand and murmurs a martyr's keeping.
observer_context: A stern pall of ash gathers over [actor_object] and some of the hurt closes.

name: Corrupted Pollen Burst
description: A burst of enthralling pollen that rakes the whole room with corrupt faerie magic.
damage_context: [a/an] [verb] swallowed in a choking burst of corrupted pollen!

name: Emerald Starfall
description: A rain of hard green starfire cast across the whole chamber.
damage_context: [a/an] [verb] raked by a rain of emerald starfire!

name: Mind-Thorn Lance
description: A focused lance of royal glamour that pierces thought and flesh together.
damage_context: [a/an] [verb] pierced through by a cruel lance of mind-thorn glamour!

name: Verdant Ruin
description: A single target curse that blooms into painful emerald fractures.
damage_context: [a/an] [verb] split by violent emerald growth from within!

name: Monarch's Cascade
description: Gianda calls down layered waves of imperial faerie force across the whole room.
damage_context: [a/an] [verb] battered by Gianda's cascading royal magic!

name: Regal Bloom
description: The monarch drinks from the corrupted life of her palace and mends herself.
support_context: [a/an] [verb] wrapped in a regal bloom of stolen life!
observer_action: [actor_name] spreads [actor_possessive] hands and draws green radiance from the palace.

name: Cinder Kiss
description: A spiteful lance of banked fire that bursts hot on contact.
damage_context: [a/an] [verb] torn into by a hungry spear of cinders!

name: Coalburst
description: A short violent bloom of black fire and stinging grit.
damage_context: A choking burst of coals tears across the whole room!

name: Grave Prayer
description: A ragged mutter over old wounds that drags flesh back together by sheer malice.
support_context: You mutter a grave prayer and stolen strength knits your wounds.
observer_action: [actor_name] mutters over old blood and bone.
observer_context: A foul prayer closes some of [actor_name]'s wounds.

name: Grave Bolt
description: A hard lance of sepulchral force driven through a single target.
damage_context: [a/an] [verb] struck by a hard lance of grave-force.

name: Unhallowed Mending
description: A cold liturgy that seals wounds with borrowed deathly vigor.
support_context: A cold liturgy knits your wounds with unclean strength.
observer_action: [actor_name] murmurs a cold and careful grave-litany.
observer_context: A pale hush settles around [actor_object] as wounds begin to close.

name: Night Veil
description: A dark veil settles over the caster, feeding resolve and battle endurance.
support_context: A dark veil settles over you, feeding your resolve with each breath of battle.
observer_action: [actor_name] draws darkness inward and binds it like a mantle.
observer_context: A dark veil settles over [actor_object], feeding grim resolve.

name: Solar Lance
description: A spear of concentrated sunfire hurled into a single foe.
damage_context: [a/an] [verb] pierced by a burning lance of radiant force.

name: Oasis Prayer
description: A hushed prayer that draws hidden mercy like water from stone.
support_context: A cool and hidden mercy passes through you, closing wounds like water over stone.
observer_action: [actor_name] bows [actor_possessive] head and whispers an oasis prayer.
observer_context: A soft gold hush settles over [actor_object] as wounds begin to close.
